name: estimator
summary: Scores a work item so the orchestrator can prioritise it — 'estimator scores, scheduler dispatches'. A runner the orchestrator CONSULTS; it never dispatches. Deterministic rubric (value·confidence + readiness − effort); swappable to an LLM scorer behind the same contract.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

exit: Returns a bounded score (0..100) + band; never dispatches.
invariants: Scores only; never dispatches (separation: estimator scores, orchestrator routes).
Score is bounded 0..100 and deterministic for a given item.
readiness is 1 only when the target is a real, named component (target != 'unknown').
